name: cpig-repmatrix-gyroid-atlasbaked
description: D7 rep-matrix cell (gyroid x atlasBaked), R1.3 2026-07-03. Creates a structural tape gyroid (period 20, thickness 1, clipped to the [-25..0]^3 box), applies the deterministic solo-perspective camera recipe (decoy-sphere framing, cloned from cpig-booleans), then select + 2x _CPigDisplayRep (cycle reaches 'atlasBaked' from the fresh-field 'auto' default), gates on steady+bakes-drained, captures. mode:capture until the operator approves baselines (STOP-POINT R1.3), then flips to pixel-diff. Degrade-by-design cells (dense field asked as tape -> companion stand-in) are kept deliberately: the documented fallback is the behavior to lock. Regenerate: scripts/gen_rep_matrix_tests.py.

setup.vlmDescription: a periodic gyroid lattice (interwoven smooth curved channels) filling a cube region, drawn from a voxel atlas: slightly softened or eroded features are the accepted look. thin lattice walls may look eroded/thinner than the tape rep — the accepted atlas voxelization look (R5 territory). NOT an empty grey viewport.

checkpoints.name: cpig-repmatrix-gyroid-atlasbaked
checkpoints.description: gyroid field rendered with the 'atlasBaked' per-field representation.
